ideation: This sequence simulates the excitement and thrill of a roller coaster ride. The arms will move dynamically, reflecting the ups and downs of the coaster.  Frame 1 starts with arms up, anticipating the ride. Frame 2 shows arms out to the sides, as if experiencing the initial drop. Frame 3 depicts arms raised in a celebratory pose, representing the peak of the ride. Frame 4 shows arms down and slightly forward, mirroring the descent. Frame 5 ends with arms at rest, suggesting the ride's conclusion.

frames.beat: arms shoot up, ready for the coaster thrill
arms spread wide for the first big drop
hands wave triumphantly at the ride's peak
arms pull in for the stomach-churning descent
both arms relax as the roller coaster slows
